name1,name2,ref,latitude,longitude,alt,dS,dH,dV
{|border="1" align="center" style="text-align:center;"!Site !! Latitude [deg] !! Longitude [deg] !! height [m] !! East [m] !! North [m] !! Up [m] !! Processor
|-
| '''ORIGIN_CLF''' || 39 17 48.90457 || 112 54 31.43708 || 1370.046 || 0.000 || 0.000 || 0.000 || OPUS
|}

{|border="1" align="center" style="text-align:center;"!Site !! Latitude [deg] !! Longitude [deg] !! height [m] !! East [m] !! North [m] !! Up [m] !! Processor
|-
| '''MD_M01''' || 39 28 22.16872 || 112 59 40.17877 || 1589.239 || -7381.352 || 19538.009 || 184.931 || OPUS
|-
| '''MD_M02''' || 39 28 22.24306 || 112 59 40.14480 || 1589.138 || -7380.538 || 19540.301 || 184.824 || OPUS
|-
| '''MD_M03''' || 39 28 22.39112 || 112 59 40.04445 || 1589.244 || -7378.134 || 19544.866 || 184.918 || OPUS
|-
| '''MD_M04''' || 39 28 22.45488 || 112 59 39.98399 || 1589.144 || -7376.687 || 19546.831 || 184.814 || OPUS
|-
| '''MD_M05''' || 39 28 22.57508 || 112 59 39.83400 || 1589.240 || -7373.098 || 19550.536 || 184.903 || OPUS
|-
| '''MD_M06''' || 39 28 22.62280 || 112 59 39.75291 || 1589.139 || -7371.157 || 19552.006 || 184.799 || OPUS
|-
| '''MD_M07''' || 39 28 22.70294 || 112 59 39.56368 || 1589.241 || -7366.631 || 19554.474 || 184.899 || OPUS
|-
| '''MD_M08''' || 39 28 22.73064 || 112 59 39.46838 || 1589.137 || -7364.352 || 19555.326 || 184.795 || OPUS
|-
| '''MD_M09''' || 39 28 22.76605 || 112 59 39.25648 || 1589.254 || -7359.285 || 19556.414 || 184.915 || OPUS
|-
| '''MD_M10''' || 39 28 22.77120 || 112 59 39.15500 || 1589.143 || -7356.858 || 19556.571 || 184.806 || OPUS
|-
| '''MD_M11''' || 39 28 22.75848 || 112 59 38.93985 || 1589.246 || -7351.715 || 19556.173 || 184.916 || OPUS
|-
| '''MD_M12''' || 39 28 22.74097 || 112 59 38.84092 || 1589.144 || -7349.350 || 19555.631 || 184.819 || OPUS
|-
| '''MD_M13''' || 39 28 22.67953 || 112 59 38.63987 || 1589.248 || -7344.545 || 19553.731 || 184.934 || OPUS
|-
| '''MD_M14''' || 39 28 22.64091 || 112 59 38.55092 || 1589.151 || -7342.420 || 19552.538 || 184.843 || OPUS
|}

{|border="1" align="center" style="text-align:center;"!Site !! Latitude [deg] !! Longitude [deg] !! height [m] !! East [m] !! North [m] !! Up [m] !! Processor
|-
| '''BR_M00''' || 39 11 17.89672 || 112 42 42.62307 || 1396.632 || 17014.499 || -12042.385 || -7.469 || OPUS
|-
| '''BR_M01''' || 39 11 17.90059 || 112 42 42.60802 || 1400.601 || 17014.870 || -12042.273 || -3.501 || OPUS
|-
| '''BR_M02''' || 39 11 17.75524 || 112 42 42.59190 || 1396.634 || 17015.256 || -12046.748 || -7.477 || OPUS
|-
| '''BR_M03''' || 39 11 17.75523 || 112 42 42.57668 || 1400.598 || 17015.632 || -12046.755 || -3.515 || OPUS
|-
| '''BR_M04''' || 39 11 18.14221 || 112 42 42.51926 || 1396.635 || 17016.974 || -12034.808 || -7.459 || OPUS
|-
| '''BR_M05''' || 39 11 18.13868 || 112 42 42.50491 || 1400.600 || 17017.329 || -12034.923 || -3.495 || OPUS
|-
| '''BR_M06''' || 39 11 18.01547 || 112 42 42.60002 || 1396.638 || 17015.044 || -12038.721 || -7.458 || OPUS
|-
| '''BR_M07''' || 39 11 18.00791 || 112 42 42.58850 || 1400.603 || 17015.332 || -12038.961 || -3.494 || OPUS
|-
| '''BR_M08''' || 39 11 18.29451 || 112 42 42.24852 || 1396.641 || 17023.463 || -12030.096 || -7.462 || OPUS
|-
| '''BR_M09''' || 39 11 18.28540 || 112 42 42.24014 || 1400.614 || 17023.675 || -12030.384 || -3.490 || OPUS
|-
| '''BR_M10''' || 39 11 18.22861 || 112 42 42.41195 || 1396.644 || 17019.544 || -12032.137 || -7.451 || OPUS
|-
| '''BR_M11''' || 39 11 18.21769 || 112 42 42.40681 || 1400.606 || 17019.679 || -12032.481 || -3.490 || OPUS
|}

{|border="1" align="center" style="text-align:center;"!Site !! Latitude [deg] !! Longitude [deg] !! height [m] !! East [m] !! North [m] !! Up [m] !! Processor
|-
| '''LR_M00''' || 39 12 28.72883 || 113 07 17.21173 || 1544.665 || -18377.085 || -9854.680 || 140.554 || OPUS
|-
| '''LR_M01''' || 39 12 28.71872 || 113 07 17.21654 || 1548.617 || -18377.213 || -9854.997 || 144.506 || OPUS
|-
| '''LR_M02''' || 39 12 28.81022 || 113 07 17.36356 || 1544.665 || -18380.723 || -9852.161 || 140.548 || OPUS
|-
| '''LR_M03''' || 39 12 28.80236 || 113 07 17.37332 || 1548.618 || -18380.969 || -9852.408 || 144.500 || OPUS
|-
| '''LR_M04''' || 39 12 28.49897 || 113 07 17.05772 || 1544.670 || -18373.406 || -9861.778 || 140.559 || OPUS
|-
| '''LR_M05''' || 39 12 28.49395 || 113 07 17.07021 || 1548.624 || -18373.718 || -9861.939 || 144.512 || OPUS
|-
| '''LR_M06''' || 39 12 28.63349 || 113 07 17.11929 || 1544.681 || -18374.874 || -9857.626 || 140.572 || OPUS
|-
| '''LR_M07''' || 39 12 28.63132 || 113 07 17.13337 || 1548.629 || -18375.223 || -9857.698 || 144.519 || OPUS
|-
| '''LR_M08''' || 39 12 28.24347 || 113 07 17.10658 || 1544.682 || -18374.597 || -9869.657 || 140.556 || OPUS
|-
| '''LR_M09''' || 39 12 28.24520 || 113 07 17.12113 || 1548.640 || -18374.958 || -9869.609 || 144.513 || OPUS
|-
| '''LR_M10''' || 39 12 28.38053 || 113 07 17.05402 || 1544.679 || -18373.326 || -9865.432 || 140.563 || OPUS
|-
| '''LR_M11''' || 39 12 28.38527 || 113 07 17.06606 || 1548.626 || -18373.626 || -9865.291 || 144.509 || OPUS
|}

{|border="1" align="center" style="text-align:center;"!Site !! Latitude [deg] !! Longitude [deg] !! height [m] !! East [m] !! North [m] !! Up [m] !! Processor
|-
| '''ORIGIN_CLF''' || 39 17 48.90457 || 112 54 31.43708 || 1370.046 || 0.000 || 0.000 || 0.000 || CSRS
|}

{|border="1" align="center" style="text-align:center;"!Site !! Latitude [deg] !! Longitude [deg] !! height [m] !! East [m] !! North [m] !! Up [m] !! Processor
|-
| '''MD_M01''' || 39 28 22.16964 || 112 59 40.17898 || 1589.254 || -7381.357 || 19538.037 || 184.946 || CSRS
|-
| '''MD_M02''' || 39 28 22.24398 || 112 59 40.14501 || 1589.153 || -7380.543 || 19540.329 || 184.839 || CSRS
|-
| '''MD_M03''' || 39 28 22.39204 || 112 59 40.04465 || 1589.259 || -7378.139 || 19544.895 || 184.933 || CSRS
|-
| '''MD_M04''' || 39 28 22.45580 || 112 59 39.98419 || 1589.159 || -7376.692 || 19546.860 || 184.829 || CSRS
|-
| '''MD_M05''' || 39 28 22.57600 || 112 59 39.83420 || 1589.255 || -7373.102 || 19550.565 || 184.918 || CSRS
|-
| '''MD_M06''' || 39 28 22.62371 || 112 59 39.75311 || 1589.154 || -7371.162 || 19552.034 || 184.814 || CSRS
|-
| '''MD_M07''' || 39 28 22.70386 || 112 59 39.56388 || 1589.256 || -7366.636 || 19554.503 || 184.914 || CSRS
|-
| '''MD_M08''' || 39 28 22.73156 || 112 59 39.46858 || 1589.152 || -7364.356 || 19555.355 || 184.810 || CSRS
|-
| '''MD_M09''' || 39 28 22.76696 || 112 59 39.25667 || 1589.269 || -7359.289 || 19556.442 || 184.930 || CSRS
|-
| '''MD_M10''' || 39 28 22.77211 || 112 59 39.15519 || 1589.158 || -7356.863 || 19556.599 || 184.821 || CSRS
|-
| '''MD_M11''' || 39 28 22.75939 || 112 59 38.94005 || 1589.261 || -7351.720 || 19556.201 || 184.931 || CSRS
|-
| '''MD_M12''' || 39 28 22.74188 || 112 59 38.84111 || 1589.159 || -7349.355 || 19555.659 || 184.833 || CSRS
|-
| '''MD_M13''' || 39 28 22.68043 || 112 59 38.64007 || 1589.263 || -7344.550 || 19553.759 || 184.949 || CSRS
|-
| '''MD_M14''' || 39 28 22.64181 || 112 59 38.55112 || 1589.166 || -7342.425 || 19552.566 || 184.858 || CSRS
|}

{|border="1" align="center" style="text-align:center;"!Site !! Latitude [deg] !! Longitude [deg] !! height [m] !! East [m] !! North [m] !! Up [m] !! Processor
|-
| '''BR_M00''' || 39 11 17.89688 || 112 42 42.62378 || 1396.652 || 17014.482 || -12042.380 || -7.449 || CSRS
|-
| '''BR_M01''' || 39 11 17.90074 || 112 42 42.60873 || 1400.621 || 17014.853 || -12042.268 || -3.481 || CSRS
|-
| '''BR_M02''' || 39 11 17.75539 || 112 42 42.59267 || 1396.654 || 17015.238 || -12046.743 || -7.457 || CSRS
|-
| '''BR_M03''' || 39 11 17.75537 || 112 42 42.57745 || 1400.618 || 17015.614 || -12046.750 || -3.495 || CSRS
|-
| '''BR_M04''' || 39 11 18.14234 || 112 42 42.51987 || 1396.655 || 17016.960 || -12034.804 || -7.439 || CSRS
|-
| '''BR_M05''' || 39 11 18.13881 || 112 42 42.50552 || 1400.620 || 17017.315 || -12034.919 || -3.474 || CSRS
|-
| '''BR_M06''' || 39 11 18.01573 || 112 42 42.60061 || 1396.658 || 17015.030 || -12038.713 || -7.438 || CSRS
|-
| '''BR_M07''' || 39 11 18.00817 || 112 42 42.58910 || 1400.623 || 17015.317 || -12038.953 || -3.474 || CSRS
|-
| '''BR_M08''' || 39 11 18.29468 || 112 42 42.24900 || 1396.661 || 17023.451 || -12030.090 || -7.442 || CSRS
|-
| '''BR_M09''' || 39 11 18.28557 || 112 42 42.24062 || 1400.634 || 17023.664 || -12030.379 || -3.470 || CSRS
|-
| '''BR_M10''' || 39 11 18.22882 || 112 42 42.41245 || 1396.664 || 17019.532 || -12032.131 || -7.431 || CSRS
|-
| '''BR_M11''' || 39 11 18.21790 || 112 42 42.40733 || 1400.626 || 17019.667 || -12032.475 || -3.470 || CSRS
|}

{|border="1" align="center" style="text-align:center;"!Site !! Latitude [deg] !! Longitude [deg] !! height [m] !! East [m] !! North [m] !! Up [m] !! Processor
|-
| '''LR_M00''' || 39 12 28.72974 || 113 07 17.21137 || 1544.667 || -18377.077 || -9854.652 || 140.556 || CSRS
|-
| '''LR_M01''' || 39 12 28.71963 || 113 07 17.21618 || 1548.619 || -18377.204 || -9854.969 || 144.508 || CSRS
|-
| '''LR_M02''' || 39 12 28.81111 || 113 07 17.36321 || 1544.667 || -18380.715 || -9852.133 || 140.550 || CSRS
|-
| '''LR_M04''' || 39 12 28.49988 || 113 07 17.05735 || 1544.672 || -18373.397 || -9861.750 || 140.561 || CSRS
|-
| '''LR_M05''' || 39 12 28.49485 || 113 07 17.06984 || 1548.626 || -18373.709 || -9861.911 || 144.514 || CSRS
|-
| '''LR_M07''' || 39 12 28.63207 || 113 07 17.13293 || 1548.662 || -18375.213 || -9857.675 || 144.552 || CSRS
|-
| '''LR_M08''' || 39 12 28.24422 || 113 07 17.10612 || 1544.715 || -18374.586 || -9869.634 || 140.589 || CSRS
|-
| '''LR_M09''' || 39 12 28.24595 || 113 07 17.12067 || 1548.673 || -18374.947 || -9869.586 || 144.546 || CSRS
|-
| '''LR_M11''' || 39 12 28.38603 || 113 07 17.06561 || 1548.659 || -18373.615 || -9865.268 || 144.542 || CSRS
|}

{|border="1" align="center" style="text-align:center;"!Site !! Latitude [deg] !! Longitude [deg] !! height [m] !! East [m] !! North [m] !! Up [m] !! Processor
|-
| '''ORIGIN_CLF''' || 39 17 48.90457 || 112 54 31.43708 || 1370.046 || 0.000 || 0.000 || 0.000 || AusPos
|}

{|border="1" align="center" style="text-align:center;"!Site !! Latitude [deg] !! Longitude [deg] !! height [m] !! East [m] !! North [m] !! Up [m] !! Processor
|-
| '''MD_M01''' || 39 28 22.16947 || 112 59 40.17875 || 1589.242 || -7381.352 || 19538.032 || 184.934 || AusPos
|-
| '''MD_M02''' || 39 28 22.24381 || 112 59 40.14478 || 1589.141 || -7380.537 || 19540.324 || 184.827 || AusPos
|-
| '''MD_M03''' || 39 28 22.39186 || 112 59 40.04443 || 1589.247 || -7378.134 || 19544.889 || 184.921 || AusPos
|-
| '''MD_M04''' || 39 28 22.45563 || 112 59 39.98397 || 1589.147 || -7376.686 || 19546.854 || 184.817 || AusPos
|-
| '''MD_M05''' || 39 28 22.57583 || 112 59 39.83398 || 1589.243 || -7373.097 || 19550.559 || 184.906 || AusPos
|-
| '''MD_M06''' || 39 28 22.62355 || 112 59 39.75290 || 1589.142 || -7371.157 || 19552.029 || 184.802 || AusPos
|-
| '''MD_M07''' || 39 28 22.70369 || 112 59 39.56367 || 1589.244 || -7366.631 || 19554.498 || 184.902 || AusPos
|-
| '''MD_M08''' || 39 28 22.73139 || 112 59 39.46836 || 1589.140 || -7364.351 || 19555.350 || 184.798 || AusPos
|-
| '''MD_M09''' || 39 28 22.76680 || 112 59 39.25646 || 1589.257 || -7359.284 || 19556.437 || 184.918 || AusPos
|-
| '''MD_M10''' || 39 28 22.77195 || 112 59 39.15498 || 1589.146 || -7356.858 || 19556.594 || 184.809 || AusPos
|-
| '''MD_M11''' || 39 28 22.75923 || 112 59 38.93983 || 1589.249 || -7351.715 || 19556.197 || 184.919 || AusPos
|-
| '''MD_M12''' || 39 28 22.74172 || 112 59 38.84090 || 1589.147 || -7349.350 || 19555.654 || 184.821 || AusPos
|-
| '''MD_M13''' || 39 28 22.68028 || 112 59 38.63985 || 1589.251 || -7344.545 || 19553.755 || 184.937 || AusPos
|-
| '''MD_M14''' || 39 28 22.64166 || 112 59 38.55091 || 1589.154 || -7342.419 || 19552.561 || 184.846 || AusPos
|}

{|border="1" align="center" style="text-align:center;"!Site !! Latitude [deg] !! Longitude [deg] !! height [m] !! East [m] !! North [m] !! Up [m] !! Processor
|-
| '''BR_M00''' || 39 11 17.89788 || 112 42 42.62298 || 1396.662 || 17014.501 || -12042.349 || -7.439 || AusPos
|-
| '''BR_M01''' || 39 11 17.90175 || 112 42 42.60793 || 1400.631 || 17014.872 || -12042.237 || -3.471 || AusPos
|-
| '''BR_M02''' || 39 11 17.75640 || 112 42 42.59180 || 1396.664 || 17015.259 || -12046.712 || -7.447 || AusPos
|-
| '''BR_M03''' || 39 11 17.75639 || 112 42 42.57658 || 1400.628 || 17015.635 || -12046.719 || -3.485 || AusPos
|-
| '''BR_M04''' || 39 11 18.14337 || 112 42 42.51918 || 1396.665 || 17016.976 || -12034.772 || -7.429 || AusPos
|-
| '''BR_M05''' || 39 11 18.13985 || 112 42 42.50483 || 1400.630 || 17017.331 || -12034.887 || -3.464 || AusPos
|-
| '''BR_M06''' || 39 11 18.01646 || 112 42 42.60004 || 1396.663 || 17015.044 || -12038.691 || -7.433 || AusPos
|-
| '''BR_M07''' || 39 11 18.00890 || 112 42 42.58852 || 1400.628 || 17015.331 || -12038.931 || -3.469 || AusPos
|-
| '''BR_M08''' || 39 11 18.29552 || 112 42 42.24856 || 1396.666 || 17023.462 || -12030.065 || -7.437 || AusPos
|-
| '''BR_M09''' || 39 11 18.28640 || 112 42 42.24018 || 1400.639 || 17023.674 || -12030.353 || -3.465 || AusPos
|-
| '''BR_M10''' || 39 11 18.22960 || 112 42 42.41198 || 1396.669 || 17019.543 || -12032.106 || -7.426 || AusPos
|-
| '''BR_M11''' || 39 11 18.21869 || 112 42 42.40685 || 1400.631 || 17019.678 || -12032.450 || -3.465 || AusPos
|}

{|border="1" align="center" style="text-align:center;"!Site !! Latitude [deg] !! Longitude [deg] !! height [m] !! East [m] !! North [m] !! Up [m] !! Processor
|-
| '''LR_M00''' || 39 12 28.72954 || 113 07 17.21190 || 1544.673 || -18377.090 || -9854.658 || 140.562 || AusPos
|-
| '''LR_M01''' || 39 12 28.71943 || 113 07 17.21671 || 1548.625 || -18377.217 || -9854.975 || 144.514 || AusPos
|-
| '''LR_M02''' || 39 12 28.81092 || 113 07 17.36374 || 1544.673 || -18380.727 || -9852.139 || 140.556 || AusPos
|-
| '''LR_M03''' || 39 12 28.80306 || 113 07 17.37350 || 1548.626 || -18380.974 || -9852.387 || 144.508 || AusPos
|-
| '''LR_M04''' || 39 12 28.49968 || 113 07 17.05788 || 1544.678 || -18373.410 || -9861.757 || 140.567 || AusPos
|-
| '''LR_M05''' || 39 12 28.49466 || 113 07 17.07036 || 1548.632 || -18373.721 || -9861.917 || 144.520 || AusPos
|-
| '''LR_M07''' || 39 12 28.63217 || 113 07 17.13360 || 1548.654 || -18375.229 || -9857.672 || 144.544 || AusPos
|-
| '''LR_M08''' || 39 12 28.24432 || 113 07 17.10680 || 1544.707 || -18374.603 || -9869.631 || 140.581 || AusPos
|-
| '''LR_M09''' || 39 12 28.24606 || 113 07 17.12135 || 1548.665 || -18374.963 || -9869.583 || 144.538 || AusPos
|-
| '''LR_M10''' || 39 12 28.38139 || 113 07 17.05425 || 1544.704 || -18373.332 || -9865.406 || 140.588 || AusPos
|-
| '''LR_M11''' || 39 12 28.38613 || 113 07 17.06629 || 1548.651 || -18373.631 || -9865.265 || 144.534 || AusPos
|}

{|border="1" align="center" style="text-align:center;"!Site !! Latitude [deg] !! Longitude [deg] !! height [m] !! East [m] !! North [m] !! Up [m] !! Processor
|-
| '''ORIGIN_CLF''' || 39 17 48.90457 || 112 54 31.43708 || 1370.046 || 0.000 || 0.000 || 0.000 || APPS
|}

{|border="1" align="center" style="text-align:center;"!Site !! Latitude [deg] !! Longitude [deg] !! height [m] !! East [m] !! North [m] !! Up [m] !! Processor
|-
| '''MD_M01''' || 39 28 22.17140 || 112 59 40.17791 || 1589.264 || -7381.331 || 19538.091 || 184.956 || APPS
|-
| '''MD_M02''' || 39 28 22.24573 || 112 59 40.14391 || 1589.163 || -7380.516 || 19540.383 || 184.848 || APPS
|-
| '''MD_M03''' || 39 28 22.39375 || 112 59 40.04349 || 1589.269 || -7378.111 || 19544.948 || 184.943 || APPS
|-
| '''MD_M04''' || 39 28 22.45750 || 112 59 39.98300 || 1589.169 || -7376.663 || 19546.912 || 184.839 || APPS
|-
| '''MD_M05''' || 39 28 22.57766 || 112 59 39.83295 || 1589.265 || -7373.072 || 19550.616 || 184.927 || APPS
|-
| '''MD_M06''' || 39 28 22.62535 || 112 59 39.75184 || 1589.164 || -7371.132 || 19552.085 || 184.824 || APPS
|-
| '''MD_M07''' || 39 28 22.70545 || 112 59 39.56258 || 1589.266 || -7366.604 || 19554.552 || 184.924 || APPS
|-
| '''MD_M08''' || 39 28 22.73312 || 112 59 39.46726 || 1589.162 || -7364.325 || 19555.403 || 184.820 || APPS
|-
| '''MD_M09''' || 39 28 22.76846 || 112 59 39.25534 || 1589.279 || -7359.257 || 19556.489 || 184.940 || APPS
|-
| '''MD_M10''' || 39 28 22.77359 || 112 59 39.15386 || 1589.168 || -7356.831 || 19556.644 || 184.831 || APPS
|-
| '''MD_M11''' || 39 28 22.76081 || 112 59 38.93872 || 1589.271 || -7351.688 || 19556.245 || 184.941 || APPS
|-
| '''MD_M12''' || 39 28 22.74327 || 112 59 38.83979 || 1589.169 || -7349.323 || 19555.702 || 184.843 || APPS
|-
| '''MD_M13''' || 39 28 22.68178 || 112 59 38.63877 || 1589.273 || -7344.519 || 19553.801 || 184.959 || APPS
|-
| '''MD_M14''' || 39 28 22.64313 || 112 59 38.54985 || 1589.176 || -7342.394 || 19552.606 || 184.868 || APPS
|}

{|border="1" align="center" style="text-align:center;"!Site !! Latitude [deg] !! Longitude [deg] !! height [m] !! East [m] !! North [m] !! Up [m] !! Processor
|-
| '''BR_M00''' || 39 11 17.89730 || 112 42 42.62393 || 1396.704 || 17014.478 || -12042.367 || -7.397 || APPS
|-
| '''BR_M01''' || 39 11 17.90117 || 112 42 42.60888 || 1400.673 || 17014.850 || -12042.255 || -3.429 || APPS
|-
| '''BR_M02''' || 39 11 17.75583 || 112 42 42.59271 || 1396.706 || 17015.237 || -12046.730 || -7.405 || APPS
|-
| '''BR_M03''' || 39 11 17.75582 || 112 42 42.57750 || 1400.670 || 17015.613 || -12046.737 || -3.443 || APPS
|-
| '''BR_M04''' || 39 11 18.14281 || 112 42 42.52018 || 1396.707 || 17016.952 || -12034.789 || -7.387 || APPS
|-
| '''BR_M05''' || 39 11 18.13929 || 112 42 42.50583 || 1400.672 || 17017.307 || -12034.905 || -3.422 || APPS
|-
| '''BR_M06''' || 39 11 18.01572 || 112 42 42.60112 || 1396.677 || 17015.018 || -12038.713 || -7.419 || APPS
|-
| '''BR_M07''' || 39 11 18.00820 || 112 42 42.58962 || 1400.658 || 17015.305 || -12038.952 || -3.439 || APPS
|-
| '''BR_M08''' || 39 11 18.29482 || 112 42 42.24970 || 1396.680 || 17023.435 || -12030.086 || -7.422 || APPS
|-
| '''BR_M09''' || 39 11 18.28571 || 112 42 42.24131 || 1400.653 || 17023.647 || -12030.374 || -3.450 || APPS
|-
| '''BR_M10''' || 39 11 18.22889 || 112 42 42.41311 || 1396.683 || 17019.517 || -12032.128 || -7.412 || APPS
|-
| '''BR_M11''' || 39 11 18.21797 || 112 42 42.40797 || 1400.645 || 17019.651 || -12032.472 || -3.451 || APPS
|}

{|border="1" align="center" style="text-align:center;"!Site !! Latitude [deg] !! Longitude [deg] !! height [m] !! East [m] !! North [m] !! Up [m] !! Processor
|-
| '''LR_M00''' || 39 12 28.72897 || 113 07 17.21135 || 1544.708 || -18377.077 || -9854.676 || 140.597 || APPS
|-
| '''LR_M01''' || 39 12 28.71885 || 113 07 17.21615 || 1548.660 || -18377.204 || -9854.993 || 144.549 || APPS
|-
| '''LR_M02''' || 39 12 28.81031 || 113 07 17.36322 || 1544.708 || -18380.715 || -9852.158 || 140.591 || APPS
|-
| '''LR_M03''' || 39 12 28.80245 || 113 07 17.37298 || 1548.661 || -18380.961 || -9852.406 || 144.543 || APPS
|-
| '''LR_M04''' || 39 12 28.49915 || 113 07 17.05724 || 1544.713 || -18373.395 || -9861.773 || 140.602 || APPS
|-
| '''LR_M05''' || 39 12 28.49412 || 113 07 17.06972 || 1548.667 || -18373.706 || -9861.934 || 144.555 || APPS
|-
| '''LR_M07''' || 39 12 28.63234 || 113 07 17.13337 || 1548.700 || -18375.224 || -9857.667 || 144.590 || APPS
|-
| '''LR_M08''' || 39 12 28.24450 || 113 07 17.10640 || 1544.753 || -18374.593 || -9869.626 || 140.627 || APPS
|-
| '''LR_M09''' || 39 12 28.24622 || 113 07 17.12095 || 1548.711 || -18374.954 || -9869.578 || 144.584 || APPS
|-
| '''LR_M11''' || 39 12 28.38631 || 113 07 17.06595 || 1548.697 || -18373.624 || -9865.260 || 144.580 || APPS
|}
